codeReview.summary: The reviewed feature metadata could not be matched to any mission feature, and the cited handoff points to commit 461debf whose diff changes startup-prewarm tests rather than a misc commit-cleanup scope. Current HEAD also leaves the chart/history expectation edits from the handoff uncommitted, so there is no clean, attributable implementation to approve for this requested feature.

issues.description: Mission metadata contains `misc-refresh-chart-history-seeded-expectations` but no `misc-commit-cleanup` feature, so the requested review target cannot be traced to a real feature definition with matching description/expectedBehavior.

The handoff for the nearest misc-runtime-cleanup implementation claims only seeded chart/history expectation updates, but the cited commit `461debf` does not contain those changes; `git show 461debf -- tests/app.test.ts` only changes startup-prewarm assertions around runtime diagnostics. The current chart/history expectation edits remain uncommitted (`git blame` shows `Not Committed Yet` at lines 6222-6230 and 6266-6268), so there is no committed feature implementation to validate.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission artifacts have drifted: the requested review target `misc-commit-cleanup` does not exist in `features.json`, and the closest handoff for `misc-refresh-chart-history-seeded-expectations` cites commit `461debf`, which actually belongs to a different startup-prewarm feature. Reviewers cannot reliably map completed work to feature metadata from shared state alone.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:1979-2001 defines `misc-refresh-chart-history-seeded-expectations`; `git show --stat 461debf` changes `src/services/market-runtime*.ts`, `tests/app.test.ts`, and diagnostics tests for startup prewarm; handoff file `...misc-refresh-chart-history-seeded-expectations__94bb0413...json` claims only test expectation edits.

summary: Fail: the requested feature cannot be reviewed as a coherent completed implementation because mission metadata/handoff/commit attribution are inconsistent and the claimed chart-history test edits are still uncommitted on current HEAD.
